metadata.description: Marketplace for the ai-skills collection — reusable skills for coding assistants, grouped by domain so projects enable only coherent sets.

plugins.name: ai-skills
plugins.description: FULL bundle (all 21 skills). Prefer the per-domain plugins — enable only what fits the project.

plugins.name: ai-skills-workflow
plugins.description: Commit format (Conventional Commits + gitmoji) and OpenSpec spec-driven workflow (vanilla + DriveZone rite).

plugins.name: ai-skills-backend
plugins.description: Python REST API conventions and dependency-resilience doctrine.

plugins.name: ai-skills-testing
plugins.description: Adversarial testing rite (bug-hunter) and REST negative/fuzz/contract testing.

plugins.name: ai-skills-fivem
plugins.description: FiveM/CitizenFX Lua conventions and Lua-side resilience patterns.

plugins.name: ai-skills-devops
plugins.description: Kubernetes YAML to Helm migration (requires the solvelab chart template).

plugins.name: ai-skills-nui
plugins.description: FiveM/RedM NUI React conventions — Lua↔React bridge, CEF rendering quirks, tokens design system.

plugins.name: ai-skills-frontend
plugins.description: React SPA API-client conventions — typed envelope + error codes, auth store factory, realtime facade.
